name: zapo-manager-root
description: Root orchestrator for Zapo-Manager (Backend and Evolution Manager v2)

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test:manager:ui:real: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-backend-window.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-frontend-window.ps1 && npx playwright test -c tests/playwright/manager-ui-real.config.ts
scripts.test:manager: npm run test:manager:api && npm run test:manager:ui
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
